subject: 6 Units | 2022 Construction Near MCAD | 18 bedrooms
text:
The James at MCAD presents a rare opportunity to acquire a new-construction (2022) boutique multifamily asset in one of Minneapolis’ most dynamic rental corridors. The property consists of 6 large-format units totaling 18 bedrooms and 15 bathrooms, designed to maximize rental efficiency through a roommate-friendly layout. Each unit features expansive 3-bedroom floor plans with 2 to 2.5 bathrooms, offering tenants modern, open-concept living spaces complemented by high-end finishes throughout. Interiors include quartz countertops, premium cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, in-unit laundry, and private balconies, creating a luxury rental experience rarely found at this scale. Built with a focus on long-term durability and minimal maintenance, the asset provides investors with true turnkey ownership and stable cash flow potential. The property has demonstrated strong income performance, with rents supporting a minimum of $15,000+ per month, highlighting its appeal to both student housing
and young professional renters.

Listing Agent
Cody Smith
Robert Dulin

* 2022 construction, minimal deferred maintenance
* 6 units, 18 bedrooms, 15 bathrooms
* Large three-bedroom layouts maximize rental income
* Luxury finishes: quartz, stainless, custom cabinetry
* In-unit laundry, private balconies, premium amenities
* Walkable MCAD location supports consistent occupancy
* Strong rental performance, flexible rental opportunity
* Transit-oriented location near highways, public transportation
